evidence.snippet: Aeroprobe’s innovative flight system solutions cater to the unique demands of Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and other autonomous platforms, featuring [Multi-function Air Data Probes](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-function-air-data-probes/) and [Micro Air Data Computers](https://www.aeroprobe.com/micro-air-data-computer-models/). These cutting-edge offerings are designed to provide essential data for safe and efficient flight operations.

Complementing our probes, our Micro Air Data Computers are compact and highly sophisticated, processing critical flight data with exceptional accuracy. They enable real-time data analysis and mission-critical decision-making. Throughout our development process, Aeroprobe places a strong emphasis on minimizing size, weight, and power requirements, ensuring that our solutions are efficient and optimized for the needs of UAVs and autonomous platforms.

items.notes: Micro Air Data Computers (µADC) and Multi-function Air Data Probes providing airspeed, angle-of-attack, altitude data for UAVs/autonomous platforms.

evidence.snippet:
*   Multi-hole Probes and Rakes
*   Advanced engineering analysis and design
*   Built using Hybrid manufacturing technology
*   On-site calibration wind tunnels
*   Data processing and analysis software tools

AeroFlow is the premier [Multi-hole Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-hole-probes/) data processing and visualization application for aerodynamicists. It applies Multi-hole Probe aerodynamic calibrations to measured pressure data to calculate the flow velocity vector, total and static pressure, Mach number, and total temperature.

items.notes: Multi-hole probes, Kiel probes, rakes, on-site aerodynamic probe calibration in wind tunnels, and AeroFlow data-processing software.

evidence.snippet: 200 Technology Drive, Christiansburg, VA 24073

Faster. Higher. Smarter. Autonomous. The next generation of Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles will be mission critical. At Aeroprobe we are committed to providing pilots and autopilots with the best on-board flow & inertial measurement information so your platform can perform with excellence.

Aeroprobe’s innovative flight system solutions cater to the unique demands of Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and other autonomous platforms, featuring [Multi-function Air Data Probes](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-function-air-data-probes/) and [Micro Air Data Computers](https://www.aeroprobe.com/micro-air-data-computer-models/). These cutting-edge offerings are designed to provide essential data for safe and efficient flight operations.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells air data sensors, probes, and micro air data computers that integrate into UAV platforms.

evidence.snippet:
NOVA:
Optimized for use with a [Pitot-Static Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/pitot-static-probes/), the Nova provides air data across a wide range of airspeeds from 10 to over 612 knots indicated airspeed.
Its compact, lightweight design is built for durability and dependable operation while delivering high performance without breaking your SWaP budget.

items.name: Micro Air Data Computers (µADC)
items.product_type: air data computer family (Gen4 Atlas, Horizon, Nova)

evidence.snippet: Micro Air Data Computers collect data from various sensors, such as Multi-function Air Data Probes or Pitot Probes and processes this data to provide accurate and real-time information to the aircraft’s flight control systems, navigation systems, and displays.

items.name: Multi-function Air Data Probes
items.product_type: air data probe for UAV flight systems

evidence.snippet: Multi-function Air Data Probes are an effective lightweight solution for measuring angle-of-attack, angle-of-sideslip, airspeed, and altitude where mobility is critical.](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-function-air-data-probes/)

items.name: Pitot-Static Probes
items.product_type: heated drained pitot-static probes for uncrewed platforms

evidence.snippet: PITOT/PITOT-STATIC PROBE
Heated Drained Pitot-Static Probes
A Total Air Temperature (TAT) Probe has the same design as a Kiel probe, but also includes a thermocouple or RTD to measure the temperature of the air flow.
A Multi-hole Probes measure flow speed and direction with high accuracy.
Omniprobes are frequently used for high-angularity wake measurements around automobile wheels, wake measurements behind automobiles and rolling-road wind tunnels.
Kiel Probes are used to measure the total pressure of a flow with high accuracy over a wide range of flow angles.

items.product_type: multi-hole probe data processing and visualization software

evidence.snippet: AeroFlow is the premier [Multi-hole Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-hole-probes/) data processing and visualization application for aerodynamicists. It applies Multi-hole Probe aerodynamic calibrations to measured pressure data to calculate the flow velocity vector, total and static pressure, Mach number, and total temperature.

items.notes: Includes AeroFlow ENGINE (DLL) and AeroFlow STUDIO (GUI).

tagline: Produces eight variants of micro air data computers and associated air data probes (pitot-static, multi-function, TAT) optimized for UAV flight across altitude and maneuver envelopes, plus multi-hole probes and calibration services for aerodynamic testing. US-manufactured, MIL-STD and DO-qualified. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of specific defense primes or programs limited.
